source: Dolt correction-slip history ledger, table lmmha
coverage_note: The LMMHA begins before the machine-readable base used here. This timeline tracks the 2001 base imported into Dolt and later correction-slip commits represented in the export ledger. Exported correction-slip events run from 2012-06-13 through 2026-06-09.
